headline: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink Warned of an AI Power Crunch—New York Just Halted Large Data Centers: CEG, VST, NEE in Focus
summary: NY's data center ban makes BlackRock CEO Larry Fink's AI grid warning a reality. See why utility stocks CEG, VST, and NEE are in focus.
